settings.backend.label: Backend
settings.backend.desc: Which on-screen keyboard to control (auto detects at startup)
settings.hideWhenUnavailable.label: Hide when unavailable
settings.hideWhenUnavailable.desc: Hide the widget entirely when the keyboard is not available
settings.disableHoverIcon.label: Disable hover icon
settings.disableHoverIcon.desc: Always show the current state icon instead of a hover icon. Note: hover icons only appear when the bar is at the top or bottom.
settings.wvkbdBin.label: wvkbd binary
settings.wvkbdBin.desc: Binary name or path (e.g. wvkbd-mobintl, wvkbd-comp, wvkbd-abc)
settings.recheck.label: Recheck state
